## Week in Review: 2026-07-06 to 2026-07-12

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 10.0.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 2.0 (-39.1% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.03)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.0 (-26.3% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.0 (-41.7% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 10.0 (-25.5% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
